text: I find myself in a modern, thoughtfully designed space, likely within a museum or innovation hub. The glass walls and bright lights suggest transparency and openness, inviting curiosity. Moving closer to the exhibit, the "R+D" wall tells me this is a place of inquiry and experimentation. I feel a sense of anticipation and inspiration, as if at the threshold of new ideas or discoveries. There’s a quiet excitement here—a reminder of humanity’s ongoing quest to understand and shape the world through research and development.
